data.name: Lens Life
data.detailed_description:
The Visual Novel “Lens Life” will present an exquisite short story for players:

Your upstairs house is rented to sisters, and as the landlord, you have already installed cameras of various angles in the room.By searching the items under the lens,Understand the personality and life habits of the two sisters,Enjoy the secret of observing the lives of sisters.

One day, you found that the sister encountered an emergency at home,and your actions may influence the direction of things.What choice will you make?
data.about_the_game:
The Visual Novel “Lens Life” will present an exquisite short story for players:

Your upstairs house is rented to sisters, and as the landlord, you have already installed cameras of various angles in the room.By searching the items under the lens,Understand the personality and life habits of the two sisters,Enjoy the secret of observing the lives of sisters.

One day, you found that the sister encountered an emergency at home,and your actions may influence the direction of things.What choice will you make?
data.short_description: Your upstairs house is rented to sisters, and as the landlord, you have already installed cameras of various angles in the room.You enjoy the pleasures of life peeping sisters,but one day find that they run into an emergency,You need to make a choice about this.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: windows 7/Windows 8/Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 650
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.5GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 960
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
